statement: For every f in the completed augmented graph space V there are finite smooth core functions f_N with f_N -> f in the augmented graph norm.

coreDensityInputStatus.label: core density input
coreDensityInputStatus.reason: The smooth core is dense in the completed augmented graph space V.

graphRecoverySequenceStatus.label: graph-norm recovery sequence
graphRecoverySequenceStatus.reason: By density, choose smooth core approximants and then a diagonal finite-section sequence converging in the V graph norm.

proof: Use the definition of V as the completion of the smooth lifted core.
Choose a core approximant within epsilon in graph norm.
Choose a finite core section of that core approximant within epsilon.
Diagonalize epsilon -> 0 to obtain f_N -> f in V.
